title: Users can't add/upload files (in comments or a file field)
excerpt: Even with View Everything and Edit Everything in permissions, I have some users who can’t add/attach a file in a comment or add a file in a column added for files.  It appears to only be working for board owners or admin…

posts.author: BruceB (Bruce Baldwin)
posts.cookedHtml: Even with View Everything and Edit Everything in permissions, I have some users who can’t add/attach a file in a comment or add a file in a column added for files. It appears to only be working for board owners or admins. Does anyone know what is causing this behavior? Thanks!

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BruceB

For this situation, I would actually recommend that you reach out to our Support Team at support@monday.com and we would be happy to help dive into this behavior with you!

Please send us over a screenshot or screen recording of the issue in action and we would be happy to dig into this further with you

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: BruceB (Bruce Baldwin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Jenna, I found out it was a permissions setting available in a more advanced permissions models. I checked the box, and now all users can upload files.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
